reviews.comment:
Baños limpios y completos .atras una placita con juegos para niños y mesas para un rico mate y arboleda al costado una parrillada libre  con un parrillero excelwnte 5 estrellas.tiene un mini espacio separado para niños pequeños al lado del comedor Muy buena atencion d las mozas y la comida casera y fresca. Por persona pagamos 4200 sin bebida ni postre ... socios del aca 10%descuento. Realmente 100%recomendable.!!!

(Translated by Google)
Clean and fully equipped bathrooms. Behind it is a small plaza with a children's playground and tables for enjoying mate, and a grove of trees to the side. There's a barbecue area with an excellent grill master (5 stars!). It has a separate mini-play area for small children next to the dining room. The waitresses were very attentive, and the food was homemade and fresh. We paid 4200 pesos per person without drinks or dessert... ACA members get a 10% discount. Truly 100% recommended!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKdXBHaERnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar,con bastante espacio para hacer una parada necesaria, o para consumir algún producto tanto fuera como dentro de la cafetería,como para ir al baño,varios sanitarios limpios y posee jabón,papel y toallitas para las manos.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place, with plenty of space to make a necessary stop, or to consume some product both outside and inside the cafeteria, as well as to go to the bathroom, several clean toilets and it has soap, paper and hand towels.
